name: io.github.composio/composio
title: Composio
description: Connect agents to 250+ apps with managed auth and tool-calling (Gmail, Slack, GitHub, Linear).

server_id.description: Your Composio MCP server ID. Create one at https://composio.dev (Dashboard → MCP) or via the Composio API.

user_id.description: An identifier for the end user. The generated MCP URL is scoped to this user.

headers.name: x-api-key
headers.description: Your Composio API key. Required when require_mcp_api_key is enabled (default for new orgs).
